five_line_tracker_v3_setup.message0: Initialize line following sensor %1 I2C address %2
five_line_tracker_v3_setup.tooltip: Create and initialize the line following sensor, I2C interface, default address 0x50

five_line_tracker_v3_get_device_id.message0: Line following sensor %1 Get device ID
five_line_tracker_v3_get_device_id.tooltip: Get the device ID of the five-way line patrol sensor

five_line_tracker_v3_get_firmware_versio.message0: Line following sensor %1 Get firmware version
five_line_tracker_v3_get_firmware_versio.tooltip: Get the firmware version number of the five-channel line-following sensor

five_line_tracker_v3_set_high_threshold.message0: Line following sensor %1 Setting channel %2 High threshold %3
five_line_tracker_v3_set_high_threshold.tooltip: Sets the high threshold (0-1023) of the specified channel for digital conversion

five_line_tracker_v3_set_low_threshold.message0: Line following sensor %1 Setting channel %2 Low threshold %3
five_line_tracker_v3_set_low_threshold.tooltip: Sets the low threshold (0-1023) of the specified channel for digital conversion

five_line_tracker_v3_get_analog_value.message0: Line following sensor %1 Read channel %2 Analog value
five_line_tracker_v3_get_analog_value.tooltip: Read the analog value of the specified channel (0-1023)

five_line_tracker_v3_get_digital_value.message0: Line following sensor %1 Read channel %2 digital value
five_line_tracker_v3_get_digital_value.tooltip: Read the digital value (0 or 1) of the specified channel and automatically convert according to the threshold

five_line_tracker_v3_get_all_digital_val.message0: Line following sensor %1 reads all digital values
five_line_tracker_v3_get_all_digital_val.tooltip: Read the digital values of all channels and return a byte, each bit represents the status of a channel

five_line_tracker_v3_check_error.message0: Is the initialization of line following sensor %1 successful?
five_line_tracker_v3_check_error.tooltip: Check if sensor initialization is successful
